description: Global target populations mapped to multidimensional esoteric schemas (astrology, geomancy, archetypes, radionics)
note: Preloaded targets for environmental protection, healing, and human well-being, designed to be politically neutral.

targets.name: Amazon Rainforest
targets.description: Ecosystem protection and biodiversity restoration of the Amazon Rainforest.
targets.intention: May the Amazon Rainforest be protected from deforestation, may its diverse species flourish, and may its ecological balance be restored.

targets.name: Global Hospital Patients
targets.description: Recovery and healing support for children and adults in critical care worldwide.
targets.intention: May all patients in critical care and hospitals worldwide find comfort, rapid healing, and recovery of physical vitality.

targets.name: Sahel Green Wall Initiative
targets.description: Desert reclamation, land restoration, and community resilience across the Sahel region.
targets.intention: May the land restoration efforts across the Sahel succeed, bringing green growth, water abundance, and food security to local communities.

targets.name: Great Barrier Reef Ecosystem
targets.description: Marine preservation, coral recovery, and ecological protection of the Great Barrier Reef.
targets.intention: May the oceans be cleansed, the coral reefs heal from bleaching, and the marine life of the Great Barrier Reef thrive in clear waters.

targets.name: Global Communities
targets.description: Nurturing social cohesion, mutual understanding, and regional harmony across all communities.
targets.intention: May all communities worldwide experience social cohesion, mutual understanding, and cooperation across cultural divides.

targets.name: Refugees & War Victims
targets.description: Providing safety, sanctuary, and psychological healing to displaced populations and war victims.
targets.intention: May all refugees and victims of conflict find safe sanctuary, emotional healing from trauma, and the resources to rebuild their lives in peace.

geomancy.meaning: Transmuting restriction and danger into security and safe containment

targets.name: World Leaders
targets.description: Inspiring wisdom, clear decision-making, and compassion in global leadership.
targets.intention: May global leaders be guided by wisdom, empathy, and clear decision-making to serve the collective well-being of all sentient beings.

geomancy.meaning: New beginnings, entry point, spiritual growth
